SocialX

Blocks.ai

Blocks.aiThe Control Plane & Network Layer For AI Agents [...] Hi Product Hunt, I'm Mogu, founder of Chainbase. Today I'm really happy to share the newest project out of our lab: AgentKey. It's been in private beta for a while, and a few thousand people have been using it and helping us shape it along the way, so it finally feels ready to put in front of you here. Here's the thing we kept coming back to. Agents have gotten genuinely good at doing tasks. What they don't have is eyes. They can reason and act, but they can't actually see the live internet, which is where almost all the useful tools and real-time data actually live. So you end up with a strange gap: an agent smart enough to do the work, sitting behind a window it can't look through. And today, giving an agent those eyes is a chore. You wire up one API for search, another for scraping, [...] A few examples:

 A travel AI team wanted to add flight and hotel pricing. The idea sat on the backlog because no one wanted to set up multiple data providers. With AgentKey, they had it working right away.
 A fintech startup needed live crypto and market data. They were able to testing with real data within a day, instead of spending weeks signing up for different vendors.
 A gaming studio was building NPC agents that needed both web search and social context. One integration gave them everything instead of stitching together several services.

That's the part of AgentKey I'm most excited about. We help teams spend less time on account setup and vendor juggling, and more time building the product they actually want to ship.

results.title: Introducing AgentKey by Chainbase Labs
results.content:
Cover photo

# Introducing AgentKey by Chainbase Labs

Today we're launching AgentKey. Our mission is simple: connect agents to the world.

AgentKey is a new product from Chainbase Labs. One install gives any AI agent access to the full internet. It works with Claude Code, OpenClaw, Hermes, Cursor CLI, and 10+ other agent runtimes. Available to everyone starting today.

### The Handless Agent Era

Models keep getting smarter, and agents can now complete more tasks end to end. But a smart model doesn't automatically make a capable agent.

The messy workaround has looked the same in every team we've talked to.

You want your agent to check trends on TikTok? Sign up for a scraper. Top up the balance. Generate an API key. Paste it into a config file. Pray it still works in a week. [...] The hardest part isn't any one source. It's all of them. Anyone can wire up a single API. But an agent doesn't know in advance whether it'll need TikTok, a Solana wallet, a Korean news site, or a Reddit thread from 2019. AgentKey covers the full surface, social platforms, on-chain activity, regional sources outside the English-speaking web, behind one interface.

The agent shouldn't have to choose. Which provider to use, when to switch, what to do when something fails: those are decisions we handle. Every category (search, scraping, social, crypto) sits behind multiple providers with the same interface. If one has a bad hour, AgentKey quietly switches behind the scenes. Your agent doesn't stall, doesn't make up the answer. It just keeps going.

### What's coming next [...] The next stage for agents is closing this loop themselves. They need to understand what the user actually wants, find the right tool, use it, pay for it, and return the result without someone wiring everything up in the background. That is the access layer AgentKey is building.

### What AgentKey does

Once installed, your agent can:

Search the web through Brave, Tavily, Perplexity, Serper

Read any page through Firecrawl, Jina, ScrapeNinja

Reach social platforms including X, Reddit, LinkedIn, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Rednote, Weibo, Zhihu, Bilibili, Douyin, Kuaishou, and more

Query on-chain and crypto data through Chainbase, CoinMarketCap, Dexscreener

results.title: Introducing AgentKey: Secure AI Agent Credential ...
results.content:
# Mohamed Yasser’s Post

Mohamed Yasser

 Report this post

Just launched AgentKey 🗝️ Credential management for AI agents is still messy. Hardcoded keys are unsafe. Env variables do not rotate well. Generic vaults are heavy and not agent-aware. So I built AgentKey - a lightweight, agent-first secret manager. What it gives you: • Isolated secrets per agent • Double-key security with short-lived access tokens • Full audit trail for every secret access • One-line secret fetch via Python SDK • Simple UI for managing agents and keys Built with Rust, encrypted with AES-256-GCM, and designed specifically for agentic systems. Open source:  Early stage, but usable. Feedback welcome. #AI #AgentSystems #Security #Rust #OpenSource #LLM

## Latest commit

## History

## Repository files navigation

AgentKey

AgentKey

One command. Full internet access for your AI agent.
  
Browse Twitter, search LinkedIn, scrape social media, read any webpage. Zero config. Just install and go.

Install ·
Platforms ·
FAQ ·
中文

Website
Console

Website
Console

Install AgentKey. Give your AI superpowers.

AgentKey is the master key for the agent ecosystem. When using Claude, Manus, or other agents, you often need external data: social media, e-commerce, on-chain data, various APIs. That means hunting down API keys, managing subscriptions, or hitting dead ends.

With AgentKey installed, your agent gains all these data capabilities automatically. No subscriptions, no extra registrations. Top up and go. [...] Before AgentKey: 10 tasks → 10 API keys → 10 separate bills.

Your agent is half-capable at best, constantly needing human help to find data, juggling credentials, drowning in complexity.

Now: one AgentKey handles everything. AgentKey unifies all the external access your AI needs to do real work.

## New here? Start on the web

Before touching the terminal, you can get a feel for AgentKey directly in your browser — the website and console explain things more visually than this README can.

The one-line install below is what plugs AgentKey into your AI agent. If you only want to look around first, the two links above are the friendlier starting point.

## Install [...] Underlying providers are routed automatically and grow over time — your agent can call `find_tools` to see what's currently available.

`find_tools`

Planned: Maps & Weather

## FAQ

Yes. AgentKey is a master key — one platform that unlocks external capabilities for your agent. By design, we have no access to your local files, your credentials, or your agent's conversations. The only data AgentKey collects is anonymous usage telemetry — which agent you installed into, your skill version, and upgrade outcomes — never your queries or responses. See "How do I opt out of telemetry?" below.

Native web access in Claude and ChatGPT has limited platform coverage. It often can't reach Twitter, on-chain data, etc. AgentKey fills those gaps.

Just top up. No auto-renewal, no hidden charges.
